emails.subject: Canada's P&L
emails.body: Canada's P&L This is what I have for Canada's p&l for January 2001. Can you let me know what you reported so that we can make sure that it is the same? Kathy

emails.subject: Re: Canada's P&L
emails.body: Re: Canada's P&L Kathy, I have attached a copy of the P&L that was reported as of January 31 for Canada. You will notice that Disturnal's P&L is no longer reported as part of Canada, however I have included his p&l for tieout purposes. If you have any questions please let me know. Robin Kathy Reeves 02/02/2001 04:12 PM
